modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Fujitsu Battery Charging Control Update Tool notification on laptop.

full_description_text: 
The user reported that a notification regarding the Fujitsu Battery Charging Control Update Tool is appearing on their laptop. This issue is occurring on a Fujitsu laptop that was purchased between 2010 and 2016. The user is seeking clarification on the purpose of this tool and why it is being displayed.
short_description: Fujitsu Battery Charging Control Update Tool notification on laptop.
description: The user reported that a notification regarding the Fujitsu Battery Charging Control Update Tool is appearing on their laptop. This issue is occurring on a Fujitsu laptop that was purchased between 2010 and 2016. The user is seeking clarification on the purpose of this tool and why it is being displayed.
